category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a refactoring alarm; official GitHub README says Code Limit tells developers when it is time to refactor.
display_name_sources: official GitHub README heading uses "Code Limit".
docs_sources: official GitHub README links to getcodelimit.github.io documentation, quickstart, standalone usage, configuration, and development docs.

tags_sources: source_facts.description; official GitHub README describes Code Limit as a developer refactoring tool and GitHub topics include refactoring, python, precommit-hooks, precommit, and codequality.
